# Multifunctional AI Cam — Smart OS

> An AI-powered smart camera operating system built on a Seeed XIAO ESP32-S3 Sense microcontroller with a cloud FastAPI backend. Integrates Google Gemini 2.5 for vision and audio, OpenCV for motion detection, and Telegram for real-time alerts and media delivery.

## What this project does

This project turns a small ESP32-S3 microcontroller into a multi-mode AI camera device. It has no physical buttons — all input is via PDM microphone tap detection. A companion VPS backend handles heavy AI and video processing.

## Key features

- Guard mode: real-time motion detection using OpenCV frame differencing, captures 40 frames and stitches H.264 MP4 video, sends to Telegram within seconds
- AI Assist mode: captures UXGA photo, sends to Google Gemini 2.5 Flash for a one-sentence description (≤90 chars), renders result on OLED and forwards to Telegram
- Classic mode: tap-triggered photo capture with optional countdown, direct Telegram delivery
- Voice mode: 2-second WAV recording via PDM mic, Gemini Audio classifies into one of 8 commands (guard, ai, photo, settings, sleep, back, next, unknown)
- Timelapse mode: UXGA frame every 2 minutes, PSRAM-buffered, FFmpeg-stitched MP4 sent to Telegram
- IT Support mode: acts as USB HID keyboard on a paired Windows PC, Gemini 2.5 Pro runs remote diagnostic loops via PowerShell

## Hardware

- Seeed XIAO ESP32-S3 Sense (dual-core 240MHz, 8MB Flash, 8MB PSRAM)
- OV2640 camera module (up to UXGA 1600×1200)
- 0.91" SSD1306 OLED display (128×32, I2C)
- PDM microphone (built-in, used for tap detection and voice commands)
- 250mAh LiPo battery (portable/wearable)
- USB-OTG / TinyUSB HID keyboard emulation

## Tech stack

- Firmware: C++ / Arduino (ESP-IDF)
- Backend: Python 3.10+ / FastAPI / uvicorn
- AI: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash (vision + audio), Gemini 2.5 Pro (IT diagnostics)
- Vision: OpenCV (motion detection, frame processing)
- Video: FFmpeg (H.264 MP4 encoding)
- Messaging: Telegram Bot API
- Display: U8g2 library (SSD1306 OLED)

## Portfolio page
